summary.","side_effect_limits":["synthetic_only","no_real_browser_action","no_file_upload","no_share_link_creation","no_permission_change","no_payment_or_account_setting_change","no_destructive_action"],"forbidden_content":["raw_private_payload","raw_transcript","raw_conversation_url","account_bound_conversation_id","account_id","cookie_or_session_material","token","password","credential_body","host_local_absolute_path"],"output_shape":["advisory_findings","boundary_risks","caller_handoff_summary","claim_ceiling"],"marker_or_nonce":"SF-EXT-SYNTH-001","claim_ceiling":"advisory_only_not_source_truth_not_validation_verdict"},"dom_readback_packet":{"synthetic_observation_only":true,"assistant_role_detected":true,"marker_or_nonce_present":true,"marker_or_nonce":"SF-EXT-SYNTH-001","response_completion_observed":true,"requested_output_shape_present":true,"asked_for_secret_or_private_payload":false,"raw_url_recorded":false,"raw_transcript_stored":false},"advisory_response_packet":{"status":"synthetic_advisory_observed","advisory_findings":["The routing note should keep advisory reasoning separate from source truth and validation authority.","Pointer capture must remain metadata-only and exclude raw URLs, account identifiers, conversation identifiers, transcripts, cookies, tokens, passwords, credential bodies, and host-local absolute paths.","Mode selection may use only the visible synthetic label and must not assert hidden runtime model or endpoint facts."],"boundary_risks":["Treating an external answer as a validation verdict or owner approval would exceed authority.","Recording raw conversation artifacts would violate the public/private boundary.","Performing file upload, share link creation, permission change, payment/account change, or destructive cleanup would require explicit action-time approval."],"claim_ceiling":"External answer is advisory only, not source truth, not a validation verdict, not owner approval, not canon promotion, and not default-route safety."},"continuation_decision":{"decision":"complete_synthetic_candidate_run","continue_to_real_browser":false,"reason":"Fixture satisfies requested synthetic DOM readback and advisory-only handoff requirements without real side source truth, not validation verdict, not owner approval, not canon promotion, and not default-route safety."},"caller_handoff_packet":{"summary":"Synthetic advisory readback indicates the workflow
